name: NUCOR CORP
business: Nucor is a diversified steel producer with three segments: steel mills, steel products, and raw materials. It sells steel and steel products to external customers and also uses internally. Key end markets include infrastructure, data centers, energy, and advanced manufacturing.

exposures.sentence: Demand was strong in several key end markets, including infrastructure, data centers, energy, and advanced manufacturing

catalysts.event: Capital expenditures for 2026 estimated at $2.50 billion
catalysts.sentence: Capital expenditures for 2026 are estimated to be approximately $2.50 billion.

catalysts.event: Issuance of $220 million IDRBs for West Virginia sheet mill
catalysts.sentence: In November 2025, Nucor issued $220 million in 40-year variable rate West Virginia Economic Development Authority industrial development revenue bonds ("IDRBs") to partially fund the construction of the West Virginia sheet mill.
We expect earnings to increase in the first quarter of 2026.
